packet.topic: Minimalist camping gear setup in nature
packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Versatile aspect ratio for environmental campaigns and adventure lifestyle social media posts balancing horizontal and vertical composition.
packet.positive_prompt: Minimalist camping site with simple tent, portable stove, backpack, natural forest or mountain setting with pine trees and rocks, golden hour or clear daylight lighting, earth-tone colors, no people, no branded gear, no logos or copyrighted designs
packet.negative_prompt: Visible brand logos, people, text, watermarks, editorial content, copyrighted designs, public figures
packet.technical_specs: Natural warm lighting, sharp focus on camping equipment and natural elements, earthy color palette
